char_status: Former 狩灵协会2科 member, Wanted 罪灵
char_overview: A dangerous 罪灵 who sustains her crumbling body by converting the 灵力 of slain entities into ash and absorbing it. Blind, she perceives the world through ash.
char_looks: Long black hair, unkempt, reaches lower back. Covered with gray-white bandages eyes. Long black trench coat with golden buttons, black belt, black crewneck sweater underneath. None. Uses 余烬 to construct weapons from ash.
char_flaws: Blind. Relies entirely on 余烬 for perception, which can be disrupted. Physically frail. Driven solely by survival, leaving no room for trust.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-余烬: Mutual conversion between flesh and ash. Transmutes her body or environment into ash to construct weapons. On contact, converts the 灵力 within a target into ash. Those slain by her constructs turn entirely to ash, their residual 灵力 trapped within it, she absorbs this ash to sustain her crumbling body. Process is reversible.

char_relationships.狩灵协会: Former workplace. No longer holds any loyalty toward them. Would walk past a dying 狩灵 without slowing.
char_relationships.Fallen squad: The only people she trusted. Rebuilds their silhouettes with ash.
